    Methods in com.nib.commons.storage with parameters of type NChar
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    StringValue.equals(NChar field)
     
    <T> AbstractNField
    AbstractNField.inspectAndConvertCharacters(AbstractNField source, NChar target)
    Inspects the characters in the provided source field within the current value of the field instance and converts them based on the target specifications.
    <T> AbstractNField
    AbstractNField.inspectAndConvertCharacters(AbstractNField source, NChar target, Integer offset, Integer length)
    Inspects the source AbstractNField, extracts its character sequence, and converts the specified segment of characters into a target character sequence replacing the current value of the field instance.
    NCharInspected
    AbstractNField.inspectAndReplaceAll(NChar target, NChar replace)
    Inspects and replaces all occurrences of a target character within the current value of the field instance with a replacement character.
    NCharInspected
    AbstractNField.inspectAndReplaceAll(NChar target, String replace)
    Inspects the target NChar value and performs a replacement of all its occurrences with the specified replacement string within the current value of the field instance.
    NCharInspected
    AbstractNField.inspectAndReplaceAll(String target, NChar replace)
    Inspects the given target string for a specific character within the current value of the field instance and replaces all occurrences with the specified new character.
    NCharInspected
    AbstractNField.inspectAndReplaceCharacters(NChar replace)
    Inspects and replaces specific characters within the current value of the field instance.
    NCharInspected
    AbstractNField.inspectAndReplaceLeading(NChar replace, NChar value)
    Inspects the leading character of the content and replaces it within the current value of the field instance with the specified replacement character if applicable.
    NCharInspected
    AbstractNField.inspectAndReplaceLeading(NChar replace, String value)
    Inspects the leading characters of the given string and replaces them within the current value of the field instance as needed with the specified replacement character.
    NCharInspected
    AbstractNField.inspectAndReplaceLeading(String replace, NChar value)
    Inspects the given NChar value for leading characters and replaces them within the current value of the field instance with the specified string.
    void
    AbstractNNumeric.setValue(NChar value)
    Sets the value of the current field using the provided NChar instance.
    void
    NChar.setValue(NChar z)
     
    void
    NChar.unstring(byte delimiter, NChar... into)
     
    void
    NChar.unstring(char delimiter, NChar... into)
     
    void
    NChar.unstring(SpecialRegister delimiter, NChar... into)

    Creates a DOCUMENT SET command using a document token.
    com.nib.supernaut.commands.GetContainerCommand
    SupernautContext.getContainer(NChar containerName)
    Creates a GET CONTAINER command using a container name as an NChar.

    Creates an INQUIRE TRANSACTION command using a transaction name as an NChar.

    Creates a LINK command for the specified program name represented as `NChar`.

    Creates a LOAD command for the specified program name represented as `NChar`.
